sub_goals.description: wireDnd via event delegation. moveCard for cross-list, reorderCard for same-list. drag-over class managed.
sub_goals.verification_notes: S4.A1 cross-list -> moveCard; S4.A2 same-list -> reorderCard; S4.A3 drop outside list returns no-op (no mutation called); S4.A4 drag-over class added on dragenter, cleared on dragleave/drop/dragend.
